title: Deposit Not Credited
text: If your crypto deposit has not arrived, check whether the transaction has enough blockchain confirmations, whether the deposit address is correct, and whether the selected network is supported.

title: Withdrawal Delay
text: Withdrawals may be delayed due to network congestion, risk control review, incorrect address format, or temporary wallet maintenance.

title: API Key Permission
text: API keys can have different permissions such as read-only, trade, and withdrawal. For security, withdrawal permission should be enabled only when necessary.

title: KYC Verification
text: KYC verification may require identity documents, face verification, and address information. Processing time depends on document quality and regional requirements.

title: Password Reset
text: If you cannot log in, use the password reset flow. After resetting your password, withdrawals may be temporarily restricted for security reasons.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
text: Two-factor authentication protects your account. If you lose access to your authenticator app, you may need to submit identity verification to reset 2FA.

title: Order Not Filled
text: A limit order may not be filled if the market price does not reach your limit price, or if there is insufficient liquidity at that price level.

title: Funding Fee
text: Funding fees are periodic payments between long and short position holders in perpetual contracts. The rate depends on market conditions.

title: Account Security
text: To protect your account, enable two-factor authentication, use a strong password, avoid phishing links, and review login history regularly.

title: Network Selection for Deposits
text: When depositing crypto, the selected network must match the withdrawal network from the sending platform. Using the wrong network may result in loss of funds.
